hooks.command: [ -z "$TMUX" ] && exit 0; p=$(jq -r '.prompt // empty'); [ -z "$p" ] && exit 0; w=$(printf '%s' "$p" | head -c 2000 | claude -p --model haiku 'Output ONE short lowercase word (max 12 chars, letters only, no punctuation) naming what this users request is about. Reply with only the word.' 2>/dev/null | tr -dc 'a-z' | head -c 14); [ -n "$w" ] && tmux rename-window -t "$TMUX_PANE" "$w"
